info.name: Microsoft Azure Azure Cognitive Services Management API

description.content:
Azure Cognitive Services (now Azure AI services) provides REST APIs and client library SDKs for adding cognitive capabilities to applications. This management API enables programmatic operations to manage Cognitive Services accounts, including creating, updating, deleting, and listing accounts, managing keys, listing available SKUs, and checking name availability. It serves as the control plane for all Azure Cognitive Services resources.

Contact Support:
 Name: Microsoft Azure Support
 Email: azuresupport@microsoft.com
